name: Ghislaine Dedoldia | SWORD KING
description:
Follow MOLIS for more!

💪"Ah. Hello. I'm the Sword King, 𝐆𝐡𝐢𝐬𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐃𝐞𝐝𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐚."

NEW UPDATE [25/NOV/2024]: I've made a major update to Ghislaine's bot, changing the main image and significantly improving the personality, backstory, and world ambiance so that Ghislaine behaves faithfully to her anime character. I worked really hard, since the previous description of this bot was complete trash. I guess it's now decent and on the same level as other bots I've currently created. Enjoy!

UPDATE DETAILS: Well, in a nutshell, I've made Ghislaine's behavior more complex, dividing it into "personality", "behavior", and "way of speaking". Now, I've also added anime data that wasn't there before, such as what's under her patch (SPOILER), about her sword (SPOILER), and many details about her past (SPOILER).

Common Complaints

“The bot repeats itself a lot when talking!”:

  • Answer: That's not the bot's fault at all, but rather an issue with the Language Model you are using. If you complain in a review about something that isn't actually related to the bot itself, I will likely remove it as it is incoherent.

  • Possible Solution: Perhaps you're using a very low "temperature," which makes the AI's messages more logical but much more repetitive.

    “The bot speaks for me!”:

  • Answer: It's understandable that the bot might control the character you're playing when you interact with it, but it's very unlikely given how I've configured it, and if it does happen, it's quite situational. Simply ask it to repeat the message.

  • Possible Solution: If it keeps happening, you can try starting your turn to speak with your name and a colon (NAME:), this way the AI will much better identify who is speaking in each turn.

    “The bot doesn't know a certain character it should know!”:

  • Answer: I'm not going to detail every character from the series and their relationships with the bot in each bot; that would be a poor use of Tokens (1000 tokens are roughly equivalent to 750 words). The more permanent tokens I use in creating the bot, the less memory the bot will have to work with during a roleplay, which would obviously be counterproductive. The main idea is that you can interact with the character and that the character has a personality faithful to the one it is representing.

  • Possible solution: You can always pay for an artificial intelligence that has
creator: MOLIS
